title: XTTS Settings
description: Configuration for the XTTS speech synthesis engine. XTTS stays local, but it still needs the Studio XTTS runtime and the Python packages listed in its requirements before it can be enabled.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: How fast the voice speaks. Use a value below 1.0 for slower, more deliberate speech. Use a value above 1.0 for faster speech.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: How adventurous the model is when choosing the next sound. Lower values are steadier and more predictable. Higher values add variation, but can also make output less consistent.

repetition_penalty.title: Repetition Penalty
repetition_penalty.description: Helps the model avoid repeating the same words or sounds. Raise it if the voice loops or gets stuck repeating itself.

top_k.title: Top-K
top_k.description: Limits each choice to the top K most likely options. Smaller values are stricter and steadier. Larger values allow more variation.

top_p.title: Top-P
top_p.description: Controls how wide the model can search for the next sound. A good starting point is around 0.9. Lower values keep the voice tighter and more predictable; higher values make it more varied, but can also make it wander.

safe_mode.title: Safe Mode
safe_mode.description: Use a more conservative cleanup path before synthesis. Leave this on if XTTS is unstable or if you want the safest default behavior.

x-ui.summary: XTTS Local stays on your machine, but it still needs the Studio XTTS runtime and any Python packages listed by the engine before it can be turned on. Good starting values are speed 1.0, temperature around 0.7, top-p around 0.9, top-k around 40 to 50, and a repetition penalty around 1.1 to 1.2. If the card says needs setup, click Install Deps to install the required packages, then verify the engine again using the Default Voice from General settings.
